input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.9.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.9.2.3
            TITLE: each acceleration run is performed as follows:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.9.2.3: Each Acceleration run is performed as follows:
D.9.2.3 Each Acceleration run is performed as follows: 
a. The foremost part of the vehicle will be staged at 0.30 m behind the starting line 
b. A Green Flag or light signal will give the approval to begin the run 
c. Timing starts when the vehicle crosses the starting line  
d. Timing ends when the vehicle crosses the finish line

final_answer: D.9.2.3 Each Acceleration run is performed as follows: a. The foremost part of the vehicle will be staged at 0.30 m behind the starting line b. A Green Flag or light signal will give the approval to begin the run c. Timing starts when the vehicle crosses the starting line d. Timing ends when the vehicle crosses the finish line
